name: @insthync/nodejs-in-app-purchase
description: In-App-Purchase validation and subscription management for iOS, Android, Amazon, and Windows

scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:unit: node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test test/fetch.js test/builtins.js && node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test --test-name-pattern=parse test/apple.js && node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test test/google.js && node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test --test-name-pattern="Can NOT|Can get an error" test/windows.js
scripts.test:integration: node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test test/apple.js && node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test test/amazon.js && node --require ./test/node-test-shim.js --test test/windows.js
